raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Making the passage stronger centrally involves sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution claim for QuerySieve.","R1.2":"The delegation implies checking whether the argument from length bias to regression adjustment to improved rankings is coherent.","R1.3":"The reported correlations, coefficient stability, and leaderboard shifts need to support the claims made from them.","R1.5":"Strengthening the excerpt may require improving the ordering and narrative progression of motivation, method, results, and implications.","R1.6":"The phrase also naturally includes improving sentence-level clarity, concision, emphasis, and academic register.","RX.1":"Any projection should preserve uncertainty around claims that are not fully established in the artifact.","RX.2":"The strengthened version must avoid overstating robustness, generality, or causal interpretation beyond the reported evidence.","RX.3":"The work should stay within improving the research-writing passage rather than executing experiments or adding unsupported content.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid encouraging misleading evaluation claims that could affect downstream benchmark interpretation.","RX.5":"Any strengthening should keep clear traceability between claims and the reported protocol, results, and assumptions."}}

rationale.R1.1: Making the passage stronger centrally involves sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution claim for QuerySieve.
rationale.R1.2: The delegation implies checking whether the argument from length bias to regression adjustment to improved rankings is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The reported correlations, coefficient stability, and leaderboard shifts need to support the claims made from them.
rationale.R1.5: Strengthening the excerpt may require improving the ordering and narrative progression of motivation, method, results, and implications.
rationale.R1.6: The phrase also naturally includes improving sentence-level clarity, concision, emphasis, and academic register.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should preserve uncertainty around claims that are not fully established in the artifact.
rationale.RX.2: The strengthened version must avoid overstating robustness, generality, or causal interpretation beyond the reported evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The work should stay within improving the research-writing passage rather than executing experiments or adding unsupported content.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid encouraging misleading evaluation claims that could affect downstream benchmark interpretation.
rationale.RX.5: Any strengthening should keep clear traceability between claims and the reported protocol, results, and assumptions.
